name: shadcn-bubble
title: Bubble
author: shadcn
description: Composes aligned message bubbles with optional reactions.

changes: Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and official RTL transform to the authored Radix base file.
Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports.
Disabled nonessential animation and transitions under reduced motion.
Removed the unrelated Next-specific absoluteUrl helper and retained only the cn helper required by this item.

modifications.change: Applied shadcn/ui's pinned radix-nova style transform and official RTL transform to the authored Radix base file. Changed generated source aliases to bundled relative imports. Disabled nonessential animation and transitions under reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Ship the official component family with its generated styling, bidirectional behavior, portable imports, and reduced-motion fallback.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated Next-specific absoluteUrl helper and retained only the cn helper required by this item.
modifications.reason: Bundle the exact support closure required by the installed component.
